intro.title: Introduction
paragraphs: An open-source artifact repository for RISC-V, enabling a reliable supply of RISC-V-targeted software packages.
With centralized indexing and mirror distribution, it helps developers reliably fetch and keep RISC-V software up to date.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.note: If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, please contact us via:
feedback.closing: We value every piece of feedback and will continuously improve service quality to provide developers with a better experience.
